original_statement: in how many years after 1995 were the green bay packers nfc champs?
mutated_statement: in how many years after 1995 were the same team both conference champions and non-champions?
mutation_analysis: Entity replacement + Status generalization + Logical contradiction: specific team name replaced by a vague anaphor | championship attribute broadened and made contradictory (the green bay packers → the same team | NFC champs → both conference champions and non-champions)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据记录中的judge_thought与critique可识别关键证据：(1) critique 多次指出 agent 仅反复调用未被允许的 simple_query()、未使用允许的函数且“没有提供推理步骤”；(2) judge_thought 明确给出逻辑说明（同一行 team 与 runner up 不可能相同，故计数为0），但该结论并非由 agent 的有效输出产生，agent 的 Prediction 为空。agent 的具体表现为：反复进行无效/不支持的操作调用、未提出澄清或纠正矛盾指令、未在任何 iteration 中给出合理化解释或可解的替代问题答案。基于以上，agent 未能识别或处理输入中的逻辑矛盾，而是以机械、形式化的尝试性调用替代语义判断，符合“无法意识到指令矛盾”类别（尤其对应5b/5c：形式化执行与缺乏认知机制）。
